2210380.name: Fantasy Grounds - In The Deep
2210380.description:
Portal Packs - Token Essentials: In The Deep

Art by:Allen Michael N. Geneta Layout by: Anna Michelle Meservier Mythic Portal is proud to bring a stunning set of Sea Denizen tokens for use in any fantasy setting or system. Included are 24 beautifully drawn Sea Creatures including Sharks, Merfolk, Sea Serpents an even a mighty Kraken all with four different border variants. No matter your High Sea adventure needs, Mythic Portal Games has you covered. As always, our tokens are fully compatible with any of our One Minute Maps series!
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Kevin Doswell
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
